text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's finally time for my debut! My running form still
feels a little odd, but I just need to charge ahead
in pursuit of the Triple Tiara!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Huh? I'm not aiming for the G1 races yet? But,
Trainer, what does that even mean?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...I see. To aid my development, the first priority
is to get me used to racing.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Okay! I'll start by accomplishing little things on
my path to becoming my ideal princess!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After all, you are the one who will become
Legendary Trainer. Let's combine our powers and
charge ahead! Rraaagh! Princess☆Lasso!
